title: sphaerocionium scabrum
intro: Sphaerocionium scabrum, also known as the scabrous shield fern, is a type of lichenized fern found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Sphaerocionium scabrum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by applying a topical cream or ointment to the affected area.
